## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the GrowthX Managing Director role and company strategy with potential candidate Stewart Mohammadi.](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has experienced rapid growth, scaling from \~20 to 48 accounts and $1.3M to $6M ARR in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [The company is implementing a pod structure with Managing Directors to oversee 2-3 pods each, addressing scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [GrowthX's unique value proposition combines powerful tech/AI capabilities with high-touch customer service and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [There's significant untapped potential in expanding services and deepening client relationships as capacity increases](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Rapid Growth and Scaling Challenges

  - [Scaled from \~15-20 clients and $1.3M ARR to 48 accounts and $6M ARR in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Currently onboarding 2-3 new accounts per week](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Kyle (speaker) has become a bottleneck, leading kickoffs and managing client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Need to scale team, processes, and leadership to keep pace with demand](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### New Pod Structure and Managing Director Role

  - [Implemented pod structure in December with Managing Editors leading pods of 2 account managers and 1-2 writers](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Creating Managing Director role to oversee 2-3 pods each](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [MDs will ensure proper strategy, build client relationships, and free up Kyle's capacity](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Aiming for pods to manage 7-8 accounts each (up from current 4-5)](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Product and Service Hybrid Approach

  - [GrowthX combines powerful tech/AI capabilities with high-touch customer service](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Unique position as both a product and service company](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Strong word-of-mouth and "insider" reputation among clients](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Challenge: maintaining product innovation while scaling rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Untapped Potential and Future Directions

  - [Many accounts have unexplored opportunities for expanded services](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Example: Galileo account with new CMO eager for additional services](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Potential to become clients' full growth team, even helping build their internal teams](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Exploring automated hiring processes as a potential service offering](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue aggressive hiring to bring on experienced talent quickly](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Implement Managing Director role to oversee pods and deepen client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Develop strategies to maintain product innovation while scaling](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Explore additional service offerings and ways to expand client engagements](https://fathom.video/share/YGXik1Tf-zEznG2rvE2dcF5oiHZF4m6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
